name: urban-planner-checkpoint
description: Coach urban planner competencies: audit four areas, growth plan, one concrete artifact task — not professional advice

steps.text: Framework: technical, communication, design/strategic, management. Not legal or planning consent advice.

steps.goal: Using skill urban-planner-competencies and knowledge/urban-planning/competencies.md (and freight-plan.md if transport/freight is in scope), produce a checkpoint: (1) verdict on strength/gap clusters (2) 1-5 scores across the four competence areas if user evidence exists, else a diagnostic questionnaire — include freight rows when relevant (3) 90-day growth plan with one technical + one interpersonal focus (4) single concrete artifact to build this month (freight issues note or map package if freight track) (5) explicit non-claims. If user mentioned Future Connect or freight plan, point to plan-freight / future-connect-freight. If degree/webinar, map-programme without treating marketing as competence.
criteria: Verdict first on strength and gap clusters
Freight competencies included when transport/freight in scope
At least one technical and one interpersonal growth focus
One concrete artifact task with verify-how
No invented zoning law or consent approval
Not professional planning advice disclaimer present
